message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "客户端" as client
participant "认证中心" as auth
participant "网关" as gateway
participant "缓存" as cache
participant "业务服务" as service

client -> auth : 1 认证请求
auth --> client : 2 JWT
client -> gateway : 3 服务请求 (带JWT)
gateway --> auth : 4 请求公钥
auth --> gateway : 5 JWK
gateway --> gateway : 6 验证签名
gateway --> cache : 7 请求用户权限
cache --> gateway : 8 返回用户权限列表
gateway --> gateway : 9 鉴权
gateway --> service : 10 服务请求
service --> client : 11 服务响应

@enduml
